description: This stylish pair in a rounded toe box design from lee cooper makes a trendy statement combined with superior performance. It’s a perfect combination of enhanced cushioning and durability. These shoes offer superior traction and protection to the feet, while remaining comfortable and stylish enough for casual wear. You can team these with jeans and tees for a cool casual look. Upper Leather uppers for better comfort and durability Stitch detailing for greater reinforcement and style Rounded toe box for more comfort Elasticated inserts on the sides for easy insertion and removal of the feet Padded collar and tongue for extra comfort Textile lining for greater comfort Midsole Cushioned foot-bed for all day comfort Outsole TPU outsole with a textured pattern and flex grooves for durability and higher abrasion resistance Slightly curved mid-foot for ergonomic comfort and style shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Use a branded leather conditioner Do not store in direct sunlight
